data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement 'Booking block if form incomplete'. However, the evidence does not confirm that the system effectively blocks bookings when the intake form is incomplete. The linked use case states that required fields must be complete before the appointment, but there is no evidence showing that the system enforces this rule at the booking stage, indicating a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of system behavior blocking bookings when the intake form is incomplete.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
